name: Mushroom Barley Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak mushrooms in hot water for 20-30 minutes. Strain through a fine sieve, reserving the liquid.
2. Chop the mushrooms and set aside.
3. In a saucepan, sauté the onion in butter until soft. Add the chopped mushrooms, carrots, barley, reserved mushroom liquid, chicken stock, and black pepper. Cover and simmer for 1 1/2 hours.
4. Add potatoes and bay leaf. Cover and let simmer for an additional 30 minutes.
5. Discard the bay leaf and stir in the sour cream (to taste). Reheat the soup without boiling it. Garnish with a pinch of dill weed before serving.
